column1: Query SQL: SELECT * FROM url_language_status WHERE status <> 'done' ORDER BY url_id , language limit 200

Query SQL: SELECT uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error, COUNT(DISTINCT h.language)  AS hotels_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hd.language) AS desc_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.language) AS policies_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) AS legal_langs FROM url_queue uq LEFT JOIN hotels h ON uq.id = h.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_description hd ON uq.id = hd.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_policies hp    ON uq.id = hp.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_legal hl ON uq.id = hl.url_id GROUP BY uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) < 6 OR COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) < COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ASC limit 200
-- Conteo de fotos únicas por hotel (paso en inglés = canónico)
SELECT h.url_id, uq.external_ref, h.hotel_name, COUNT(DISTINCT i.id_photo) AS unique_photos
JOIN image_data i ON i.hotel_id = h.id
JOIN url_queue uq ON uq.id = h.url_id

column1: SELECT uq.id AS url_id, uq.external_ref, h.hotel_name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS count_all_hotels, COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) AS count_all_legal, COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS count_all_descriptions, COALESCE(hs.count_service_category_en, 0) AS count_service_category_en, COALESCE(p.count_polices_en, 0) AS count_polices_en, COALESCE(p.count_polices_es, 0) AS count_polices_es, COALESCE(p.count_polices_fr, 0) AS count_polices_fr, COALESCE(img.count_highres_url, 0) AS count_highres_url, COALESCE(img.count_large_url, 0) AS count_large_url, COALESCE(img.count_thumb_url, 0) AS count_thumb_url
LEFT JOIN hotels h ON h.url_id = uq.id LEFT JOIN hotels_legal l ON l.hotel_id = h.id LEFT JOIN hotels_description d ON d.hotel_id = h.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT url_id, COUNT(*) AS count_service_category_en FROM hotels_all_services WHERE language = 'en' GROUP BY url_id) hs ON hs.url_id = uq.id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT url_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE language = 'en') AS count_polices_en, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE language = 'es') AS count_polices_es, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE language = 'fr') AS count_polices_fr FROM hotels_policies GROUP BY url_id ) p ON p.url_id = uq.id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT h.url_id, COUNT(i.name_jpg) FILTER ( WHERE i.category = 'highres_url') AS count_highres_url, COUNT(i.name_jpg) FILTER (WHERE i.category = 'large_url') AS count_large_url, COUNT(i.name_jpg) FILTER (WHERE i.category = 'thumb_url') AS count_thumb_url FROM hotels h LEFT JOIN image_downloads i ON i.hotel_id = h.id WHERE h.language = 'en' GROUP BY h.url_id) img ON img.url_id = uq.id

GROUP BY uq.id, uq.external_ref, h.hotel_name, hs.count_service_category_en, p.count_polices_en, p.count_polices_es, p.count_polices_fr, img.count_highres_url, img.count_large_url, img.count_thumb_url

column1: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count, MIN(updated_at) AS oldest, MAX(updated_at) AS newest FROM url_queue GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
-- ── Q12: Comprehensive diagnosis of all affected URLs
SELECT uq.id, uq.external_ref, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error,
COUNT(DISTINCT h.language)  AS hotels_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hd.language) AS desc_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.language) AS policies_langs, COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) AS legal_langs

FROM url_queue uq LEFT JOIN hotels h ON uq.id = h.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_description hd ON uq.id = hd.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_policies hp ON uq.id = hp.url_id LEFT JOIN hotels_legal hl ON uq.id = hl.url_id GROUP BY uq.id, uq.status, uq.retry_count, uq.languages_completed, uq.languages_failed, uq.last_error HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) < 6 OR COUNT(DISTINCT hl.language) < COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) ASC
-- Run after each batch to confirm all 6 languages are captured.

SELECT uq.id  AS url_id, uq.url, uq.external_ref, uq.status, COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) AS lang_count, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT h.language, ', ' ORDER BY h.language) AS languages_present, 6 - COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) AS missing_count, uq.languages_failed FROM url_queue uq LEFT JOIN hotels h ON h.url_id = uq.id WHERE uq.status IN ('done', 'error') GROUP BY uq.id, uq.url, uq.status, uq.languages_failed HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT h.language) < 6 ORDER BY missing_count DESC, uq.updated_at DESC
SELECT event_type, status, count(*) FROM scraping_logs GROUP BY event_type, status ORDER BY count DESC
-- ── Q15: Logs from the last session:
SELECT url_id, language, event_type, status, duration_ms, scraped_at FROM scraping_logs WHERE scraped_at >= '2026-03-31 22:00:00+00' ORDER BY scraped_at DESC LIMIT 30
-- ── Q16: Distribution using only confirmed columns

SELECT event_type, status, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS avg_s, ROUND(MIN(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1)    AS min_s, ROUND(MAX(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS max_s FROM scraping_logs GROUP BY event_type, status ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT url_id, language, event_type, status, duration_ms, ROUND(duration_ms / 1000.0, 1) AS duration_s, scraped_at FROM scraping_logs WHERE duration_ms > 100000 ORDER BY duration_ms DESC

SELECT language, COUNT(*) AS scrapes, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS avg_s, ROUND(MIN(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS min_s, ROUND(MAX(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS max_s, ROUND(STDDEV(duration_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS stddev_s FROM scraping_logs WHERE status = 'done' GROUP BY language ORDER BY avg_s DESC
-- ── Q19: Timestamp collision risk (WARN-ORM-001, scraped_at as ORM PK)
SELECT scraped_at, COUNT(*) AS collision_count FROM scraping_logs GROUP BY scraped_at HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY collision_count DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image_data) AS total_image_data, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image_downloads)  AS total_image_downloads, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image_downloads)::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM image_data), 0),2) AS downloads_per_photo
-- ── Q21: Download status breakdown — fill in after confirms 'status' column
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM image_downloads GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT event_type, status, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)/1000.0, 1)  AS avg_s, ROUND(MIN(duration_ms)/1000.0, 1)  AS min_s, ROUND(MAX(duration_ms)/1000.0, 1)  AS max_s FROM scraping_logs GROUP BY event_type, status ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT tablename, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename)) AS size FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename LIKE 'scraping_logs%' ORDER BY tablename
SELECT 'hotels' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM hotels
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_description',              COUNT(*) FROM hotels_description
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_policies',                 COUNT(*) FROM hotels_policies
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_legal',                    COUNT(*) FROM hotels_legal
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_fine_print',               COUNT(*) FROM hotels_fine_print
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_all_services',             COUNT(*) FROM hotels_all_services
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_popular_services',         COUNT(*) FROM hotels_popular_services
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_faqs',                     COUNT(*) FROM hotels_faqs
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_guest_reviews',            COUNT(*) FROM hotels_guest_reviews
UNION ALL SELECT 'hotels_property_highlights',      COUNT(*) FROM hotels_property_highlights
UNION ALL SELECT 'image_data',                      COUNT(*) FROM image_data
UNION ALL SELECT 'image_downloads',                 COUNT(*) FROM image_downloads
UNION ALL SELECT 'url_language_status',             COUNT(*) FROM url_language_status
UNION ALL SELECT 'scraping_logs',                   COUNT(*) FROM scraping_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'url_queue',                       COUNT(*) FROM url_queue
-- ── Q25: DATA QUALITY — hotels_popular_services vs hotels_all_services
--    Validate that popular is a reasonable subset of all_services
--    pct alto (>100%) This would indicate that popular has items not present in all

SELECT ps.url_id, ps.language, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.popular_service)  AS n_popular, COUNT(DISTINCT al.service) AS n_all, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT ps.popular_service)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT al.service), 0) * 100, 1) AS pct_popular_de_all FROM hotels_popular_services ps LEFT JOIN hotels_all_services al ON al.url_id = ps.url_id AND al.language = ps.language GROUP BY ps.url_id, ps.language ORDER BY pct_popular_de_all DESC LIMIT 90
